PropertyList.name: AI ATC
PropertyList.short-description: AI-powered ATC clearances and taxi routing for FlightGear.
PropertyList.long-description: Provides realistic ATC clearances, taxi routing, and phraseology using a Python sidecar that communicates with the Gemini AI API when online and falls back to deterministic groundnet.xml parsing when offline. Ground, tower, and ATIS frequencies are read from FlightGear navdata. Taxi routes are computed via A* over the airport groundnet graph and read aloud via macOS TTS.
